creator: mzaki@niid.go.jp
text:
I'm sending a patch of FreeBSD ports, biology/ruby-bio, updating to 1.3.0 from 1.1.0.
It works fine for me, although I have tested only for very fundamental functions.
Please note that the port now depends on ActiveRecord, but I'm not familiar with the framework.
Anyway, please update the FreeBSD ports repository.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
